title: This is Regression! (Optional)
body: (This question uses the same data as Question $$3$$ on the Summer $$2024$$ Final Exam) Conan has an unhealthy addiction to Rocket League, a game where players play soccer but with cars instead of people. Players can pick up boost pads that are scattered across the field, which players can use to make their cars go faster! Conan plays $$50$$ games and records how much boost he used, as well as how many times he touched the ball in a given game.\n##figure1.gif
